text_block_list.text: One day, toward the end of summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get started.
choice_data_list: First, we'll start with a warm-up!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Got it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Darn it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What in the world was that sound?! Are you
okay?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm fine! I can keep goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know you're in a rush to improve. But lemme tell
you, it hurts to look at you in this state!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Then don't! I've... I've got dis!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I hafta win!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What?! This is totally unlike you, Tamamo!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started, Trainer. I need to work harder
too!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...
choice_data_list: Okay, let's take a ten minute break!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff...

At Gold City's request, I've been putting her
through a course of extra-heavy training.
However, her body is beginning to reach its limits.
choice_data_list:
(I'd really like her to take a proper break
soon...)

text_block_list.text:
Knowing Gold City, she'll just reject any
suggestion that threatens to reduce her training
time. There has to be a way to convince her...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ah! Found you, City! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey! ☆ What's popping?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that looks rough! No surprise coming from
little Miss Stoic.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Helios, Jordan... What's up?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You free tonight?! Let's launch some fireworks! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Helios brought some sparklers and stuff. Isn't that
hilarious?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You two do realize what summer camp is for,
right?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: To light up the sky!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You're coming, right, City? We're gonna get it
popping like literally! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Light up the sky?! How're you going to do that
with "sparklers and stuff"?! You're up to
something dangerous for sure!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh boy. I can't let them go off on their own.

Gold City is clearly opposed to the idea, but she
needs the time to unwind. This might be my
chance to convince her.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm talking about! Then your trainer
can be our adult supervision. ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying we got us our responsible adult, so now
we just need a spot. And just when I was about to
hit up Teach!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see how you handle these two.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! ☆ So, about where to do it!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
My friend who owns a private beach says beaches
are better, but my mountain hippie friend says
the mountains!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So what do you think?! We're a teensy ways from
the beach, and the mountains sounds like a
teensy uphill trek.
choice_data_list: A teensy ways to the beach.

text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Eyyy, City! Stop being such a drag, get turnt up!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Can't we just chill for a minute? Then we can get
out the sparklers or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: No can do! Hype up and re-hype!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Stop playing games and get serious! This is a
party!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Where's the mega firework?! This one's going
to the moon!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ugh, Helios! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: This is hilarious. I have to take a video.
Time passes as they have their fun.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Is that all the fireworks we have? Laaame.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't there a convenience store along the way?
I can go check.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'll go. Even though it's kind of a hassle.
Trainer, you're on bag carrying duty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Where's your energy?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Here, grab more fireworks! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: It's fiiine! Let me show you how it's done!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pfft. Good luck stopping Helios. Oh, I can't.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right? Girl is built different. I gotta record this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our lively party continues for some time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Is that all the fireworks we have? Laaame.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't there a convenience store along the way?
I can go check.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'll go. Even though it's kind of a hassle.
Trainer, you're on bag carrying duty.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, listen. You better be taking good care of
City, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I know she acts all nonchalant about everything,
but on the inside, she's a delicate soul.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
At first, I liked her because I thought she was
cool, but now I really care about her. Seriously.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
When I'm with her, it's like... like it makes me care
a little more about myself too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm too slow to figure out why City's been
having a hard time. So, I can't really help her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: She might be too sweet to stand up for herself, but I'll do it—whatever that it is...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, it's hard to put into words, but the point is I
won't forgive you if you treat her wrong!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: We'll see about that.
choice_data_list: City is lucky to have such a kind friend.
City is lucky to have such a kind friend.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ew! You're so corny!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, Gold City seems to have had
a nice break.
